UpgradeTheFreeDomainNameToTheUniversalVe.action: The value of this parameter in this API is upgradeToDiscount.
UpgradeTheFreeDomainNameToTheUniversalVe.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters.
UpgradeTheFreeDomainNameToTheUniversalVe.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid. Currently only Prepaid is supported.
UpgradeTheFreeDomainNameToTheUniversalVe.billing.reservation: Reservation information. Not required for Postpaid; must be set for Prepaid.
